user.title: Saturday Voice Satellite
user.description: Configure the Saturday web voice satellite. FCM fields are optional - fill them in to enable native Android call screen.

data_description.name: Display name for this satellite device.
data_description.server_url: The URL of the Saturday web app (e.g., https://sat.example.com).
data_description.ntfy_url: The URL of the ntfy server (e.g., https://ntfy.example.com).
data_description.ntfy_topic: The ntfy topic to publish call notifications to.
data_description.fcm_project_id: Firebase project ID (e.g., my-project-12345). Found in Firebase Console > Project Settings.
data_description.fcm_service_account: Full JSON contents of a Firebase service account key file. Generate from Firebase Console > Project Settings > Service accounts.
